creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192732
Screenshot showing font display problems

After a recent update, no OpenJFX application can display its fonts correctly.  The numbers display fine, but the alphabetic characters don't.  Java applications that use Swing instead of JFX are unaffected.  You can reproduce the problem with any of OpenJFX the demo programs from http://download.oracle.com/otn-pub/java/jdk/8u172-b11-demos/a58eab1ec242421181065cdc37240b08/jdk-8u172-linux-x64-demos.tar.gz .  The attached screenshot is from Modena.jar.
